channel.title: Tune Clinic Blog
channel.description: Evidence-based aesthetic medicine insights from the physicians at Tune Clinic.

item.title: Why Comparing Lifting Treatments Doesn't Always Lead to Better Decisions
item.description: Ultherapy vs. Thermage debates miss the point. A physician explains why the real question isn't which device is better — it's which problem you're trying to solve.

item.title: Three Lifting Devices, Three Different Jobs — Ultherapy, Thermage, and Oligio Compared
item.description: Ultherapy, Thermage FLX, and Oligio are not interchangeable. A physician explains which layer each device targets and how to choose based on your anatomy.

item.title: Same Treatment, Different Results — The Variables You Can't See
item.description: Why two patients can receive the same aesthetic procedure and walk away with completely different experiences — and what actually determines the outcome.

item.title: Before Chasing Results, Define the Right Standard
item.description: Why 'Is this treatment effective?' is the wrong first question in aesthetic medicine — and what to ask instead before making a decision.

item.title: Why Most Filler Fears Are Based on Outdated Information
item.description: A physician explains why common filler fears — migration, overfilling, long-term damage — usually reflect older techniques, not modern evidence-based practice.
